nasb.text: So then, I have seen the wicked buried, those who used to go in and out from the holy place, and they are soon forgotten in the city where they did thus. This too is futility.

esv.text: Then I saw the wicked buried. They used to go in and out of the holy place and were praised in the city where they had done such things. This also is vanity.

cnv.text: 然後我看見惡人得以埋葬，他們生前在聖地往來，而在他們這樣行的城中，竟被人遺忘。這也是虛空！

ccb.text: 我看见恶人生前出入圣所，死后安葬，还在他们作恶的城中受到称赞，这也是虚空。

csbs.text: 此后我看到恶人被埋葬，他们曾在圣地往来，但还是在出入过的城中被人遗忘。这也是虚空！
